overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction RPG showing a character exploring a futuristic spaceship showroom. The character walks past a suspended vehicle display and ship services terminal before exiting through a rear doorway into an interior corridor. The environment features metallic industrial architecture with cool blue artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury spaceship showroom with suspended vehicle display

agents.ego_description: walking through the showroom, approaching the ship services area while observing the suspended spaceship

notable_agents.action: standing at the Ship Services terminal, observing the approaching character

entered.detail: large suspended spaceship with metallic hull and illuminated blue accents hanging from ceiling trusses
illuminated orange signage with company name mounted below the spaceship
modern lounge chairs and couch against the right wall
decorative plant in a metallic cylindrical container
service terminal with glowing blue holographic sign reading SHIP SERVICES

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a high-end spaceship showroom, passing a large suspended vehicle with Stroud-Eklund branding. The space features modern furnishings and a Ship Services terminal where an NPC stands waiting. The camera moves steadily forward, revealing more of the industrial-chic interior with metallic walls and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: back wall with engineering displays and corporate branding

events.description: character turns right to walk along the back wall, passing the Ship Services NPC

agents.ego_description: walking along the back wall of the showroom, passing various engineering displays and corporate logos

entered.detail: large illuminated triangular corporate logo mounted on the back wall
glass display case containing a rotating spaceship engine component
dark doorway with red exit sign above leading to interior corridors
transparent safety barrier along the edge of the raised platform

segments.scene_description: The character turns along the back wall, passing the Ship Services area and approaching a large Stroud-Eklund corporate logo. A glass display case containing engine components becomes visible, along with a glass safety railing. The character continues toward a doorway at the far end of the showroom.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor leading to facility interior

events.description: character enters the doorway, transitioning from the open showroom to the narrow interior corridor

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the exit doorway, leaving the showroom for the interior corridor

entered.detail: narrow hallway with metallic walls and doors extending beyond the threshold
red illuminated exit sign mounted above the doorway

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the exit doorway, passing the last of the showroom displays. After passing through the threshold beneath a red exit sign, the scene transitions into a narrower, more enclosed corridor. The glass railing falls behind as the character moves into the facility's interior spaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a high-end spaceship showroom that gradually transitions into a narrow industrial corridor. It begins by moving steadily forward past a large suspended vehicle with Stroud-Eklund branding and a Ship Services terminal where an NPC stands. As the character turns along the back wall, the scene shifts toward a corporate logo and a glass display case of engine components, guided by a glass safety railing. The camera then approaches the far end of the showroom, passing the final displays before crossing the threshold beneath a red exit sign. Finally, the open, modern interior gives way to a more enclosed and utilitarian facility corridor as the showroom displays fall behind.
